Created by Biniru Projects

Welcome to Inventory Slot 29!

⛏Mine ores from rocks
🔥Smelt bars at the furnace
🗡Smith weapons & armor
⚔Go on adventures!

Train skills, complete quests, collect rare pets!

Inventory Slot 29

Beta v0.6

Zero In-Game Purchases

This game will never have microtransactions. Everything is earnable through gameplay.

How We Stay Running

Maximum 5 non-intrusive ads per day. 100% of revenue goes to:

  • Server hosting & maintenance
  • AI model training for bigger tools
  • Building free tools for everyone

Full Transparency

We believe you deserve to know exactly where your attention goes. No hidden fees, no pay-to-win, no loot boxes. Ever.

Made with care by Biniru Projects

A fan-made companion. Not affiliated with Jagex Ltd.
Privacy Policy
